changeList: 2.1.275-1-3efcbb9: Fix completed rips stuck in active downloads list
2.1.274-1-389d18b: Add Instagram reels support and fix history removal
2.1.273-1-9ae1fd8: Move re-ripped history entry to bottom on start
2.1.272-1-cedc8eb: Restore history row at rip start with 0/0
2.1.269-1-a4df883: Enhance TwitterRipper URL handling for photo downloads
2.1.268-1-09c6e33: Enhance TwitterRipper functionality and update configuration
2.1.267-1-d660021: Enhance InstagramRipper with user ID caching and improved API request handling
2.1.266-1-d840060: Refactor InstagramRipper to improve API request handling and error logging
2.1.265-1-9b0ebfa: Implement long configuration field handling in MainWindow and Utils
2.1.264-1-5018707: Enhance MainWindow configuration with new options and improve config key management
2.1.262-1-5b64f8d: Improve error logging and response handling in BlueskyRipper and Http classes
2.1.259-1-f86f8b8: Enhance MainWindow layout and component configuration
2.1.258-1-1f3c24a: Enhance MainWindow layout and component configuration
2.1.257-1-861b915: Refactor MainWindow layout and configuration handling
2.1.256-1-4e98857: Add circuit breaker for consecutive HTTP errors
2.1.255-1-15b1877: Add shutdown hook for log cleanup and enhance DeviantartRipper URL handling

2.1.254-1-ec258ed: Refactor DeviantartRipper to support search functionality. Update URL handling to include search queries and enhance error messages for invalid URLs. Add unit tests for search URL handling and GID generation. Modify DownloadFileThread and DownloadVideoThread to report existing downloads correctly.

2.1.253-1-db51cf5: Refactor URL history management in AbstractRipper and DeviantartRipper. Introduce recordUrlOnQueue method to control when URLs are recorded. Update DeviantartRipper to handle URL history during download completion and errors. Enhance image URL building logic to support composite item IDs and JWT tokens. Add unit tests for new functionality.

2.1.252-1-0575298: Add configureDownloadFileThread method to customize download threads in AbstractRipper and its subclasses. Update user agent and headers handling in DownloadFileThread. Enhance DeviantartRipper to utilize new download configuration methods for improved request customization.

2.1.249-1-2767c3f: Refactor DeviantartRipper to enhance API error handling and session management. Adjust retry logic for 403 errors and implement rate limit backoff strategy. Update MainWindow to set a minimum size for the UI frame.
2.1.248-1-fe89653: Refactor cookie serialization in DeviantartRipper to ensure a new HashMap is used, improving data integrity during configuration updates.

2.1.247-1-78be99f: Refactor DeviantartRipper to utilize JSON API for gallery and favorites extraction. Implement session cookie handling from Firefox and update properties for cookie loading. Enhance unit tests for improved coverage of gallery ID extraction and media URL building.

2.1.244-1-de52ca3: Enhance BlueskyRipper to support extraction of media URLs from embeds, including video playlists and images. Refactor download logic to handle HLS playlists and update API calls to use actor DID. Add unit tests for media URL extraction functionality.

2.1.243-1-f3d1eb1: Enhance FacebookRipper with improved GraphQL pagination handling and fallback mechanisms. Added new patterns for dynamic doc_id and collection identification. Updated pagination logic to ensure robust extraction of photo albums, including tests for fallback scenarios when GraphQL requests fail.
2.1.242-1-d0f1a79: Add configuration option to enable/disable Coomer video downloads

2.1.241-1-b0d2a2f: Refactor RedditRipper to improve file path handling and add support for saving self-post descriptions. Updated file naming logic to ensure compatibility with Windows paths and enhanced URL handling for image and video downloads.
2.1.240-1-bae2733: Update ripme.json to merge change entries from the latest build, preserving existing entries and ensuring no duplicates. This enhances the change tracking for future builds.

2.1.239-1-9a905da: Implement GraphQL pagination support in FacebookRipper for photo albums, allowing full extraction of images. Added methods to handle GraphQL requests and updated configuration properties for pagination settings. Enhanced tests to verify correct functionality of the new pagination logic.

2.1.237-1-f21e500: Enhance FacebookRipper to support crawling photo listing pages for full-resolution images. Implemented logic to follow permalinks for photos, ensuring thumbnails are excluded from downloads. Added tests to verify correct extraction of full-resolution images from photo listings.

2.1.235-1-fd56070: Refactor DownloadFileThread and enhance RedditRipper for improved video URL handling. Updated HTTP request setup to handle redirects more robustly and added error logging for missing Location headers. In RedditRipper, implemented a lightweight reachability check for video URLs and improved parsing of DASH playlists, ensuring higher quality video renditions are prioritized.

2.1.234-1-e0ac680: Enhance FacebookRipper to extract media from JSON blobs and prioritize HD video sources. Added patterns for HD/SD video keys and filtered out non-media URLs. Updated tests to verify extraction from escaped JSON and ensure proper handling of video quality.

2.1.233-1-110ed4b: PR #142 - Prefer direct video streams and manifest fallback in FacebookRipper (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/142) — ### Motivation - Prefer direct video stream URLs when available and fall back to media manifest URLs to improve reliability for video downloads and downstream frame-extraction workflows.

2.1.232-1-601ab26: PR #141 - docs: add troubleshooting guidance for partial social profile downloads (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/141) — ### Motivation - Users report profile rips (e.g. Facebook profile home pages) returning only a few images because profile/home feeds expose thumbnails and many small UI assets which RipMe filters out by minimum-size chec

2.1.231-1-04a6b8a: PR #140 - Improve Reddit video URL resolution and manifest fallback (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/140) — ### Motivation - Direct Reddit video links can be stale or point to missing renditions, so prefer working direct URLs but fall back to DASH manifests when needed.

2.1.230-1-dc9863e: PR #139 - Handle failing v.redd.it CMAF downloads with DASH fallback (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/139) — ### Motivation - Some Reddit posts expose `v.redd.it` CMAF renditions (`CMAF_*.mp4`) that intermittently return non-2xx responses even though the post is viewable, causing downloads to fail.

2.1.229-1-090ee53: PR #138 - Fix Reddit DASH direct video URL resolution (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/138) — ### Motivation - Reddit sometimes returns direct `v.redd.it/.../DASH_*.mp4` URLs that point to a specific rendition which may no longer exist, causing downloads to fail.

2.1.228-1-e668cea: PR #137 - Fix Facebook media URL entity decoding (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/137) — ### Motivation - Facebook media URLs embedded in pages are HTML-encoded (e.g. `&`) which can leave query parameters malformed and cause CDN 403s when downloaded.

2.1.227-1-ff0261f: PR #136 - Fix Reddit DASH/CMAF video resolution and naming (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/136) — ### Motivation - Reddit-hosted video variants like `DASH_###.mp4` and `CMAF_###.mp4` can be unavailable or cause non-unique filenames, so the ripper should resolve the correct rendition and produce a stable, unique outpu

2.1.226-1-44fc261: PR #135 - FacebookRipper: add robust fetch fallbacks with mobile/mbasic variants and request headers (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/135) — ### Motivation - Improve resilience when loading Facebook pages by trying alternate URL variants and handling HTTP 400 responses.

2.1.225-1-47044b2: PR #134 - Facebook ripper: retry via mbasic host when main host returns HTTP 400 (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/134) — ### Motivation - Facebook profile/reels pages sometimes return HTTP 400 when requested from the standard web host, causing rip failures as shown by repeated `Status=400` errors in logs.

2.1.224-1-7d1e226: PR #133 - Add FacebookRipper for extracting and downloading media from Facebook pages (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/133) — ### Motivation - Add support for ripping media from Facebook pages and posts, including handling logged-in content via browser cookies.

2.1.223-1-06a2a73: PR #132 - Improve Instagram API rate-limit diagnostics logging (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/132) — ### Motivation - Users observed unexpected Instagram rate-limiting and existing logs lacked enough context to diagnose why requests were being limited.

2.1.222-1-e8078dc: PR #131 - Retry transient 5xx responses in Http.getWith429Retry (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/131) — ### Motivation - Reddit user JSON endpoints can intermittently return HTTP 500/5xx responses which previously caused immediate rip failure, so server-side transient errors should be retried similarly to 429 rate-limits.
2.1.221-1-e6cf84e: Remove RATE_LIMIT_WAIT_TIME and adjust wait logic

2.1.220-1-c49e76a: PR #129 - Increase Instagram rate-limit retry initial delay to 32000 ms (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/129) — ### Motivation - Instagram HTTP 429 (rate-limited) responses were being retried from a small base delay and empirically require a much longer initial wait, so start rate-limit backoff at 32000 ms to reduce pointless rapi

2.1.219-1-a3dd26c: PR #128 - Add queue pause toggle to prevent starting new queued rips (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/128) — ### Motivation - Provide a way to pause the dispatching of queued downloads so no new rips are started while performing updates or maintenance.

2.1.218-1-f104614: PR #127 - Normalize HTML-encoded and percent-encoded tracking params in queue/history URLs (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/127) — ### Motivation - Links copied from HTML or other sources could include encoded ampersands (`&`) or percent-encoded query keys which prevented the app from stripping tracking parameters, causing tracking params to app

2.1.217-1-64591f1: PR #126 - Normalize tracked URLs in queue/history and merge history duplicates (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/126) — ### Motivation - Avoid duplicate queue/history entries caused by common tracking query parameters and preserve accurate download totals across runs.

2.1.216-1-e3be072: PR #125 - Normalize Instagram queue URLs by stripping tracking parameters (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/125) — ### Motivation - Prevent duplicate or noisy queue entries caused by Instagram tracking query parameters (for example `?g=5` or `?e=...&g=5`).

2.1.215-1-5987fbf: PR #124 - Merge Coomer/OnlyFans outputs into originating Reddit rip folder (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/124) — ### Motivation - When a Reddit rip spawns a Coomer/OnlyFans rip the downloaded files were left in a separate folder which caused duplicate downstream processing (for example duplicate LoRA generation).

2.1.214-1-a09b2d1: PR #123 - Set Referer for Redgifs media downloads to reduce 403s (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/123) — ### Motivation - Redgifs media endpoints are returning non-retriable `403` errors when requests lack a Redgifs referer, indicating stricter hotlink checks by the CDN.

2.1.213-1-70c6f27: PR #122 - Improve URL wrapping to prevent window expansion (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/122) — ### Motivation - Long URLs with few natural separators were causing `JLabel` contents to expand the UI to the full monitor width.

2.1.212-1-63ded91: PR #121 - Enhance updater changelog entries with pull request context (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/121) — ### Motivation - The updater `ripme.json` changelog currently uses terse commit subjects which often omit useful PR metadata for users.

2.1.202-1-5411b85: Refactor BlueskyRipper to simplify GID extraction and improve file extension handling. The GID retrieval now directly matches the URL without exception handling, and the download method has been updated to ensure proper file naming and default extensions based on URL path analysis.

2.1.201-1-d2991a9: Refactor UmdRipper to ensure proper file naming by defaulting to .mp4 extension for UMD downloads, enhancing usability when MIME type is not provided. This change improves the handling of video files from UMD endpoints.

2.1.198-1-591ecf7: Enhance UmdRipper to support video section queuing and improve path validation for various content types, including forums, groups, galleries, and profile albums. Introduce methods for handling video listings as album indices and queueing video links from profile pages.
2.1.197-1-72d7f66: Improve TwitterRipper authentication error message to clarify options for users. Include path to configuration file for adding authentication tokens.

2.1.196-1-96ed35d: Enhance UmdRipper to support pagination for profile albums by accepting links with page parameters. Normalize JSON-escaped URLs for improved media URL extraction and update download method to include UMD cookies.

2.1.195-1-a4a713c: Enhance UmdRipper to improve media URL extraction from profile albums by adding support for lazy-loaded images and extracting URLs from raw HTML. Introduce methods to handle various image attributes and ensure full-size images are preferred when available.
2.1.192-1-e7966e0: Import UnsupportedEncodingException in UmdRipper for enhanced error handling during URL processing
2.1.191-1-cb56044: Refactor download limit handling in AbstractRipper and enhance DownloadVideoThread for better error handling and resource management
2.1.190-1-75c1f36: Enhance URL display in MainWindow with HTML formatting and add htmlEscape method for safe rendering
2.1.189-1-97403ee: Refactor pause functionality in MainWindow to streamline paused URL handling
2.1.187-1-988dc15: pause downloads and see count per thread
2.1.44-1-a05480c: adding pr and manual trigger added maxDownload support
2.1.18-16-1342b621: Implement FapwizRipper; fix ChanRipper video/gif download rate limit issue; new boolean config twitter.exclude_replies; added audio post downloading support for tumblr

2.1.14-33-c275bbf6: Java-17 is now minimum version requirement, down from java-21; User Agent updated; fix Xvideos, add FapDungeon, add NsfwAlbum; added rate limiting to Coomer, E621, Redgifs, and RedditRipper's handling of Redgifs; rate limit sleep()s now include jitter; code cleanup; removed several rippers for site that are permanently offline
